description: Motion, animation, and performance tokens for XiriGo design system

shimmer._rule: All loading placeholders MUST use animated shimmer gradient sweep, never static color.

scroll._rule: All scrollable lists MUST use lazy rendering (LazyColumn/LazyRow/LazyVGrid on Android, LazyVStack/LazyHStack/LazyVGrid on iOS). Never use Column+verticalScroll or ScrollView+VStack for lists with >4 items.

imageLoading._rule: Use Coil (Android) / Nuke (iOS). Enable memory+disk cache. Downsample to ImageView size. Show shimmer during load, branded fallback on error.

performanceBudgets._rule: Profile with Android Studio Profiler / Xcode Instruments. Zero jank frames in scroll.

entranceAnimation._rule: Optional entrance animations for list items. Keep subtle. Disable for items loaded via pagination (only first screen load).
